headline: The Physics of Bitcoin reaches #1 in Macroeconomics on Amazon
body: Giovanni Santostasi's new book, The Physics of Bitcoin: Not an Asset but a Force of Nature, has reached #1 in Macroeconomics on Amazon. The book develops the Power Law Theory in full mathematical rigor and situates Bitcoin within the framework of statistical physics, the renormalization group, and self-organized criticality.
The book includes a foreword by Stephen Perrenod, Ph.D., SBI Vice-Director.

headline: A Mechanistic Derivation of the Bitcoin Price Power Law — preprint published
body: The Institute's first formal research publication is now available on Zenodo. A Mechanistic Derivation of the Bitcoin Price Power Law: Network Adoption Dynamics and Generalised Metcalfe Scaling, by Giovanni Santostasi and Stephen Perrenod, establishes that Bitcoin's price trajectory follows a power law in time with exponent β = 5.69 ± 0.05, and — crucially — derives this exponent mechanistically as the product of two independently measured physical scaling relations.
The paper is openly available under a CC-BY 4.0 license and is indexed with a permanent DOI. It represents the mathematical foundation of the Institute's research program.
